creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 188985
svn diff for graphics/gimmage

OK this port has been listed as BROKEN
The svn diff attached to this pr(1) corrects that
by bringing it closer to c++11

Tested on:
FreeBSD dev-box 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0: Wed Dec 13 06:07:59 PST 2017 root@dev-box:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/DEVBOX (r326065)

with the following results:

Script started on Tue Dec 19 21:03:24 2017
dev-box# make -DBATCH check-plist
   ...

install  -m 0644 'gimmage.desktop' '/usr/ports/graphics/gimmage/work/stage/usr/local/share/applications/gimmage.desktop'

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)

dev-box# make stage-qa
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)

dev-box# make check-sanity
===>  License GPLv2+ accepted by the user

dev-box# portlint

Script done on Tue Dec 19 21:25:38 2017

Thanks!

--Chris
